visual_text: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a large black bow is lying down on a bed, looking directly at the camera with a tired and pained expression. (2) As she narrates her story, her facial expressions shift between discomfort and mild frustration, though she remains in the same lying position. (3) The scene stays static throughout the entire video, focusing on her upper body and face as she continues to recount her experience.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and a purple top is standing in what appears to be a hotel bathroom, looking directly at the camera and speaking. (2) She maintains a friendly facial expression, gesturing slightly with her hand toward her chest as she continues her story. (3) The scene remains static as she finishes her anecdote with a knowing smile toward the viewer.

(1) The video is a live-action selfie shot. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a pink zip-up jacket and a light blue top, smiles at the camera inside an airport boarding bridge. (2) She begins walking forward along the glass-walled corridor, while the camera follows her face. Outside the window, a large commercial airplane with green and orange tail markings is parked on the tarmac. (3) She continues walking with a happy expression, passing a male traveler carrying a bag in the blurred background.

(1) A young woman with long black hair and a light purple top looks directly into the camera lens with a pouting expression. (2) She begins to speak, her facial expressions changing as she tells a story, appearing slightly exasperated. (3) She uses her right hand to gesture while speaking. (4) The video cuts to a black screen as the punchline concludes.

(1) The video opens with a young woman walking away from the camera on a wet city sidewalk at night during rainfall. She is wearing a black hooded jacket and a short skirt, carrying several orange and light blue shopping bags. (2) As she walks, she frequently glances over her shoulder with a suspicious expression, her movements appearing guarded. (3) She suddenly stops and turns around completely to face the camera with an exaggerated, sassy pose—hands on her hips and a playful yet defiant facial expression, while the camera maintains a following distance.

(1) The video opens with a shot of the exterior of 'LA VILLA' restaurant. (2) It transitions to scenic views of the Tamsui River and the Lover's Bridge. (3) A young woman is shown eating truffle pasta inside the restaurant, with shots of her smiling and taking a bite. (4) Various food items are showcased in close-up: mushroom soup, a bun being torn apart, fried chicken wings, more pasta, and finally a tiramisu cake. (5) The woman is seen again, nodding in satisfaction while eating. (6) The video ends with a panoramic view of the riverfront and the bridge under a bright blue sky.

(1) The video starts with a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black bikini top and white pants, looking down and smiling in a selfie POV. (2) She tilts her head and looks toward the camera while moving slightly, revealing a sandy beach background with palm trees and distant beach structures. (3) She continues to smile and pose gently as the camera moves with her body in a continuous shot.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black mask and a revealing beige top under a black jacket, stands on a city sidewalk at night with buildings in the background. (2) She looks slightly away then back at the camera as if listening to someone off-camera, maintaining a questioning facial expression. (3) She leans closer to the camera and speaks, ending with a slight head tilt and a zoom-in effect on her face.

(1) A young woman with a ponytail, wearing a black zip-up jacket over a blue sports top, looks confidently at the camera and holds up one finger. (2) She appears wrapped in a cartoon-patterned blanket, looking visibly exhausted and sickly with dark circles under her eyes, holding up two fingers. (3) She is wearing a shiny white jacket, looking even more drained and pale, holding up three fingers in a weak 'OK' sign. (4) The scene cuts back to her in the original black jacket, looking refreshed and energized; she holds up one finger, smiles, and begins to unzip her jacket while lunging toward the camera.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair is lying on a bed with a green pillow. She is wearing a bikini top with a leaf pattern and has a rabbit-ear filter and pink blush stickers on her face. She looks directly into the lens. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions change slightly to emphasize her words, and a small wireless microphone is visible clipped to the left side of her bikini. (3) The camera remains static throughout the video, focusing on her upper body and face as she delivers her monologue.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black spaghetti strap dress faces the camera with an annoyed expression, looking slightly downward then directly at the lens. (2) She begins speaking, her mouth moving emphatically while her eyebrows furrow to convey frustration. (3) As she delivers the final part of her speech, her expression softens slightly and she maintains a steady gaze at the camera until the video ends.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and glasses sits at a green table in a breakfast shop, holding a pen and looking intensely at a large, multi-colored menu. (2) She begins to circle items on the menu while looking stressed. (3) Animated crying stickers and variety-show style text appear around her face as she continues to study the menu like a test paper.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and bangs stands in an outdoor corridor at night, wearing a large black jacket and short pleated skirt. She smiles down at her belly, which she is pushing out while holding it with both hands. (2) She continues to pat and rub her stomach playfully while smiling towards the camera. The setting is a modern tiled corridor with warm artificial lighting from the building interior visible in the background.

(1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black spaghetti strap top, lies on a bed with blue sheets and looks into the camera with a smiling, talkative expression. (2) The scene cuts to a full-body shot of a woman in a kitchen/bedroom setting wearing a mask, a floral shirt, and a long dark skirt; she points at the floor and reacts with soft gestures while pink hearts appear on screen. (3) The video cuts to a POV shot of the first woman looking down at a yoga mat, her expression turning into one of shock and disgust as she moves quickly.

(1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue top and a black cardigan, looking directly at the camera with a pensive and slightly sad facial expression. (2) She raises both hands to her head to adjust her hair and pull it back into a ponytail, at which point the camera suddenly zooms in closer to her face. (3) She continues her hair-tying gesture while looking upwards; during this phase, animated blue tear stickers appear on her cheeks. (4) She completes the hair adjustment, lowers her hands, and looks slightly to the side with a subtle smirk as the scene concludes.

(1) The video starts with a young woman wearing a black cat-ear headband, sitting indoors and looking at a purple smartphone. Above her, there is a title block about a fan Q&A. (2) She looks up at the camera and begins speaking, gesturing with her right hand while maintaining a playful and smiling facial expression. Animated pink hearts begin to float around her. (3) A small image of an owl/hawk is superimposed on the screen briefly as she continues to talk and look at her phone for the next question. (4) She concludes by waving her hand towards the camera, maintaining a friendly expression as the video loops.

(1) The video starts with a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a peach-colored oversized hospital gown and a digital pink bow sticker, standing in a brightly lit hospital room. (2) She begins a rhythmic dance movement, swaying her body from side to side and smiling warmly at the camera. (3) She continues the gentle dance sequence, maintaining eye contact and a cheerful facial expression until the end of the clip.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink camisole, sits in front of a camera in an indoor setting. She has a subtle pouting expression and looks slightly down. (2) She begins to speak directly to the camera, her expressions shifting between thoughtful, slightly expectant, and then smiling. (3) She leans in closer to the camera towards the end, maintaining eye contact and a playful expression.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a white camisole and heavy makeup speaks directly into the camera in a close-up POV style. She uses expressive hand gestures and varied facial expressions, ranging from serious to playfully dramatic. (2) The camera periodically zooms in slightly to emphasize her points as she speaks. (3) In the final phase, a comedic 'sad' filter is applied, showing blue animated tears streaming from her eyes and a comic-style background overlay with '5555' (crying) symbols.

(1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long black hair looking directly at the camera; a hand enters the frame from the top right and briefly touches her hair. (2) The scene cuts to a medium-wide shot of a modern bedroom where a man in a dark blue bathrobe walks away from the bed towards a glass-doored closet. (3) It cuts back to the woman in a close-up, now smiling broadly and showing her teeth. (4) The lighting becomes significantly darker as the video cycles through several quick cuts showing the man in the robe walking in a dimly lit hallway or room, focusing on his torso and movement.

(1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a pink sequined top, appears in a close-up shot. She covers her mouth with her hand and appears to be coughing while looking at the camera. (2) She looks slightly down and then back at the lens, speaking while pointing her finger downwards. (3) She continues to cough, displaying a mix of a distressed and playful expression, and continues looking directly at the viewer until the end of the clip.

(1) The video is a live-action recording of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink camisole and a cream lace cardigan, smiling and talking directly to the camera. (2) As she speaks, the camera digitally zooms in closer to her face, capturing her expressive smiles and wide-eyed looks of feigned embarrassment. (3) The shot remains centered on her face and upper chest throughout the duration, with her occasionally glancing off-camera as if recounting a funny memory.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing sunglasses on her head and a low-cut black top, stands in front of a convenience store shelf stocked with canned alcoholic beverages. (2) She glances at the shelf while an off-camera person initiates a conversation. (3) She turns her head slightly towards the camera, looks down at a green can of beverage she is holding, and smiles subtly as she speaks.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and heavy makeup, wearing a brown spaghetti strap top, faces the camera directly and begins speaking with a slight smile. (2) As she continues her story, she gestures slightly with her head and looks away momentarily to emphasize her narrative. (3) Upon reaching the punchline, she opens her eyes wide in a shocked or stunned expression as cartoon question mark graphics appear around her.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black sports bra, is positioned in a close-up shot against a bedroom background. She starts with a slightly furrowed brow and a pouting expression. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions become more animated, moving from a complaining look to one of wide-eyed disbelief. (3) The video ends with her maintaining a playful, shocked facial expression while looking directly at the camera.

(1) A young woman with long, wavy dark hair and a brown spaghetti strap top is sitting in front of a plain, light-colored wall. She initially looks directly at the camera with a neutral to slightly sad expression. (2) As she speaks, her eyebrows lift and her facial expressions become more animated to match her storytelling. (3) At the conclusion of her story, she looks slightly to the side with a faint, ironic smile, maintaining her position throughout the video without significant body movement.

(1) The video features a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white spaghetti strap top, positioned in a static medium close-up shot against a plain light wall. (2) She begins by looking into the camera, then raises her right index finger to emphasize the first point. (3) She briefly touches the side of her nose with her finger as she transitions to the second point. (4) She uses open-hand gestures while explaining the third point before the screen transitions to a solid black frame.

(1) A young woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a black bra or tank top, is framed in a close-up selfie shot. She looks directly at the camera with an expressive and slightly annoyed facial expression. (2) As she speaks, she shifts her gaze, gestures by tossing her hair back with her hand, and emphasizes her points with subtle head tilts. (3) The background is a soft-focus indoor environment, possibly a bedroom or hotel room with beige walls and a bed, which remains static throughout the clip.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink scoop-neck top, a black skirt, and a white crocheted cardigan, stands in front of a neutral indoor wall, looking directly at the camera with a cheerful expression and speaking. (2) She leans forward slightly towards the lens, maintaining eye contact and a playful smile. (3) She suddenly turns her body away and bends over, causing her skirt to lift, while the camera angle shifts to a lower perspective focusing on the movement and her black undergarments.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and sunglasses on her head is looking down and writing on a yellow menu with a red clipboard. (2) The scene cuts to her biting into a large sandwich or burger, then a close-up shot of the layered sandwich is shown. (3) She is seen drinking from a paper cup and then looks directly into the camera, smiling and laughing while gesturing towards a plate of egg pancake and the sandwich on the table.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and heavy makeup, wearing a beige slip dress, sits indoors against a plain wall and speaks directly to the camera. (2) She smiles and looks slightly away before returning her gaze to the camera, with pink heart stickers appearing around her head. (3) The camera cuts to a closer shot as she laughs broadly. (4) The scene cuts back to the original framing as she looks disappointed and confused, with a question mark and thought bubble graphics appearing near her face.

(1) A woman wearing a peach-colored hospital gown and a cartoon pink bow filter on her head stands in a hospital room, looking slightly worried. (2) She appears to be knocked back or falling into a chair as the scene cuts. (3) She is sitting in a chair beside a medical cabinet, looking exhausted and leaning back. (4) She is shown sitting on a hospital bed looking towards a window, then finally lying flat on the hospital bed as the video ends.

(1) The video starts with a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a patterned qipao-style halter top, lying down and speaking directly to the camera with a subtle smile. (2) She continues to talk, maintaining her posture while her facial expressions change slightly as she recounts a conversation. (3) At the end, she gives a slightly confused and incredulous look towards the camera as decorative text appears, followed by a cut to a black screen.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black lace-sleeved top and a light-colored bra, stands in profile in a dim indoor setting. She holds a black ice cream cone with two scoops and licks it while looking slightly off-camera. Behind her is a large, circular, glowing moon-like decoration and some green bamboo-like plants. (2) She stops licking the ice cream, turns her head to face the camera directly, and breaks into a wide, cheerful smile.

(1) The video is a live-action recording of a young woman sitting inside a car. She is wearing a bright pink scoop-neck top and has a pink rabbit-ear filter with a large bow overlaid on her head. (2) She looks directly into the camera, using her right hand to gesture with one, two, and then three fingers as she lists points. (3) She maintains an expressive and playful facial expression, frequently tilting her head and pouting her lips while speaking.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue and gold floral pattern qipao-style top, is positioned in front of a plain, light-colored wall. She looks into the camera, smiling and gesturing slightly with her head as she speaks. (2) She maintains eye contact, her expression shifting to a bashful and shy smile as she continues her story. (3) The video cuts to a black screen at the very end while a different voice delivers a punchline.

(1) The video begins with a close-up of a female creator lying on a bed, wearing a black top and a pink bow sticker animation on her head, speaking directly to the camera. (2) B-roll overlays appear showing her in an outdoor garden holding a basin full of puppies, followed by footage of a mother dog nursing and the creator bottle-feeding a single puppy. (3) The scene shifts back to the talking creator as she gestures with her hands. (4) A transition occurs showing an adult brown-and-white dog in various settings, including a car and a backyard. (5) A series of quick cuts displays different holes dug into the concrete and dirt of a yard, with numbers 1 through 9 appearing sequentially on the screen. (6) A large hole exposing a white water pipe is shown prominently. (7) The video concludes with the creator smiling and gesturing while the dog is shown wearing a red and white striped shirt.

(1) A young woman with long wavy dark hair, wearing large-frame purple-tinted glasses and a low-cut pink shirt, is sitting in the driver's seat of a car, speaking directly to the camera. (2) As she recounts her story, pink heart animations and digital blush effects appear on her face; she touches her mouth with her finger and looks playfully at the camera. (3) The camera zooms in significantly on her mouth and lower face as she continues the dialogue. (4) The scene shifts back to her full face with animated blue tear stickers flowing from her eyes and a barrage of floating text captions appearing as she expresses physical exhaustion and distress.

(1) A young woman with long, dark hair and fair skin is leaning forward on a white table or surface. She is wearing an oversized white button-down shirt that is partially open, looking directly at the camera with a soft expression. (2) As the video progresses, she shifts her posture slightly, revealing a pink lace bra underneath the shirt. She maintains eye contact with a gentle smile and subtle head tilts.

(1) A young woman is lying on a bed with blue and white striped sheets, wearing a light blue low-cut top; her hand is initially held close to the camera lens, obscuring part of the frame. (2) She lowers her hand and smiles broadly at the camera while lying horizontally. (3) She maintains her position, smiling and making eye contact with the lens throughout the remainder of the clip.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and a red strap top looks directly into the camera, speaking with expressive facial movements. (2) She continues her narration, occasionally shifting her gaze and using subtle hand gestures as she tells a story. (3) During the conclusion of her story, the visual adds a yellow border effect and duplicating visual overlays to emphasize her final point. (4) She finishes speaking with a slight smile and a relaxed posture.

(1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing glasses and an off-shoulder black top, sits on the floor in front of white cabinets. She looks serious and holds a Doraemon plush toy. (2) A full-screen graphic appears with a pink background, featuring a cartoon bunny and interactive buttons for 'YES' and 'NO' regarding a channel subscription. (3) The woman reappears on screen, now smiling and gesturing with her hands as she introduces herself and begins to talk to the camera.

(1) A young woman with black hair in a pink t-shirt sits in a rustic indoor setting, looking down and rhythmically moving her hands as if preparing for a clap sequence. (2) Suddenly, a brown and white dog appears in her lap, and she holds its paws to make it 'dance' or react to the music. The camera zooms in on the dog's face as the woman smiles widely.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink short-sleeved top and a cartoon rabbit ear filter, is sitting in the driver's seat of a stationary car, speaking directly into the camera. (2) Various Chinese text overlays appear in the center of the frame; a small cartoon sticker of a person vomiting appears on the left; an inset image of a hand covered in a white, thick, viscous liquid is briefly shown to illustrate her story. (3) She continues talking with expressive facial movements, showing a mix of surprise and mild disgust, while gesturing slightly.

(1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a low-cut black top, facing the camera with a frustrated yet playful expression. (2) As she speaks, she gestures with her hands, pointing at herself and making small movements to emphasize her words. (3) Towards the end, she raises her hand with fingers slightly spread and then pulls it back, mimicking hesitation, ending with a slight frown and a playful look.

(1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink tank top, sits at a table with a bucket of fried chicken and a can of Coca-Cola Zero; she is looking at her smartphone. (2) The video cuts rapidly between the woman and various clips of muscular men showing their abdominal muscles in different indoor settings like gyms and bedrooms. (3) The woman picks up a piece of fried chicken and a french fry while watching a video on her phone that depicts a man and a woman in a kitchen-like setting. (4) The woman reacts to the video on her phone by mimicking a gagging or disgusted facial expression while continuing to eat her meal.

(1) The video is a static close-up shot of a young woman with long dark hair lying on a bed with her eyes closed, appearing to try to sleep. She is wearing a pink camisole. (2) She slightly moves her lips and shifts her head minutely against the white pillow. (3) The camera remains fixed on her face and upper torso until the end of the clip.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown spaghetti strap top, is seen in a close-up shot lying on a bed with a blue and white striped sheet. She looks directly at the camera and speaks with an expressive facial expression. (2) As she narrates, she raises two fingers (index and middle) to illustrate a point. (3) She then raises three fingers (index, middle, ring) while continuing her story. (4) Finally, she holds her hand up with the palm facing the camera, showing her fingers and long manicured nails while smiling slightly.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue low-cut top and a white pleated skirt, stands in an indoor setting with a wooden cabinet behind her. She smiles broadly at the camera. (2) She continues to speak directly to the camera with animated facial expressions and slight swaying movements. (3) She leans slightly forward and extends both hands towards the camera in a cupping gesture while maintaining a cheerful expression.

(1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing a light blue top, holding a bottle of wine with a red label; she smiles and looks down toward the bottle. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot where she is seen in a different pose, still holding the bottle, with a white refrigerator in the background; she appears cheerful. (3) She then tilts her head back and mimes drinking from the wine bottle while laughing, followed by a final shot where she sits on the floor looking down pensively at the bottle.

(1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman lying back on a grey textured surface, wearing a green and white patterned bikini top. A digital filter of pink bunny ears and a bow is applied to her head, with small white dots on her cheeks. (2) She looks directly into the camera, smiling and talking while gesturing slightly with her head. A decorative question box with a mouse cursor icon appears over her chest area. (3) Throughout the video, she maintains eye contact, her facial expressions shifting between storytelling and laughing at the end.

(1) A young woman with long black hair, bangs, and a red camisole is lying on a bed in a bright room, resting her chin on her right hand and looking into the camera. (2) As she begins to speak, her facial expression changes from neutral to expressive, making hand gestures with her left hand to emphasize her words. (3) She continues talking with a playful smile, eventually pointing her finger towards the lens before the screen cuts to black.

(1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a shimmering pink sequined dress with thin straps. She is looking directly into the camera with a playful expression. (2) She speaks to the camera, leaning slightly forward, which emphasizes her attire. Her facial expressions are animated and flirtatious. (3) Towards the end of the clip, she smiles broadly and lets out a small laugh, maintaining direct eye contact with the lens.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue sailor-style top, lies prone on a bed, looking directly into the camera with a subtle, knowing smile. (2) As she speaks, she uses hand gestures—pointing a finger and touching her ear—while her facial expressions shift between playfulness and mock confusion. (3) She maintains her position on the bed throughout the video, ending with a calm expression as a sound effect plays.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair is seen in a close-up shot, wearing a purple tank top. She looks directly at the camera with an expressive, slightly pouting face and gestures with her right index finger toward her cheek. (2) She continues to talk to the camera, shifting her hand to her chin and then pointing upwards while maintaining eye contact. (3) The camera remains static as she asks a second question, occasionally tilting her head and using subtle hand gestures near her face to emphasize her points.

(1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing heavy makeup, a brown camisole, and a necklace. She touches her cheek with her hand and looks slightly away from the camera. (2) She turns her head to look directly at the camera while speaking, her expression shifting from a slight pout to a gentle smile. (3) She continues to gesture with her hand near her neck and chest area as she finishes her sentence, maintaining a warm and intimate eye contact with the viewer.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair wearing a purple spaghetti-strap top sits in front of a camera in an indoor setting. She initially looks pensive, resting her finger on her chin. (2) As she speaks, her facial expressions change from serious to playful, with occasional head tilts. (3) In the final phase, she looks directly at the camera with a subtle smirk while delivering a joke, maintaining her pose with her hand near her face.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple spaghetti-strap top and denim shorts, stands indoors looking directly at the camera. She starts speaking with an expressive, slightly annoyed facial expression, gesturing with her head. (2) As she continues her monologue, she leans slightly closer to the lens, her eyebrows furrowing and then relaxing as she recounts a dialogue. (3) She looks upward briefly as if mimicking someone thinking, then looks back at the camera to deliver the final statement with a smirk of disbelief.

(1) The video begins with a silhouette of a man kneeling to propose to a woman in front of the Eiffel Tower at sunset, followed by a close-up of a diamond ring being placed on a finger. (2) At 00:03, there is a sharp transition to a real-life outdoor setting where a young woman with long dark hair and sunglasses on her head smiles at the camera. (3) She mimics the finger gesture of the previous scene but reveals a Toyota car key instead of a ring, then steps back to lean against a white Toyota car, posing with a confident smile.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and heavy makeup, wearing a pink sequined top, is shown in a close-up shot. She is touching her right cheek with her index finger and looking into the camera with a slight smile. A social media comment overlay is centered on the screen. (2) She moves her hand away slightly and begins speaking or mouthing words to the camera with a playful, expressive facial movement, maintaining direct eye contact with the viewer.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair and light makeup, wearing a purple spaghetti-strap top, looks directly into the camera in an indoor setting. She starts speaking with an expressive face, using her right hand to gesture while pointing towards her hair and face. (2) As she continues to speak, her expression shifts from narrative to more animated and slightly aggrieved for comedic effect. She moves her head and shoulders while maintaining eye contact with the lens. (3) Toward the end, she adjusts her facial expression to a playful and slightly pouting look while delivering the final part of her speech.

(1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a blue denim-style dress, stands in a dimly lit outdoor environment at night. She holds a lit traditional paper lantern with illustrations on it. She looks directly into the camera with a gentle smile. (2) She shifts her weight slightly and adjusts the lantern, maintaining eye contact and a cheerful expression. (3) She continues to pose with the lantern as the warm light illuminates her face and the immediate surroundings, while the background remains dark with faint garden-like structures.

(1) The video is a live-action close-up shot of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple tank top, lying on a bed or soft surface. She looks directly at the camera with a surprised facial expression, resting her chin on her hand. (2) She shifts her hand to her cheek and begins pouting slightly while speaking, her eyes moving as she expresses emotion. (3) She continues talking, maintaining the close-up perspective with subtle head tilts and varied facial expressions reflecting frustration and humor.

(1) The video opens with a close-up shot of a small, green layered cake decorated with white frosting and a 'Happy Birthday' topper. Behind it, a woman with long dark hair smiles warmly at the camera. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot where the woman, wearing a black strapless top and blue denim jeans, holds the cake and blows out the lit candle. (3) A series of poses follow, showing her sitting and standing against a wooden wall background, smiling, pouting, and looking into the camera while presenting the cake in various angles.

(1) The video starts with a heavily blurred view of a grey tiled floor, simulating impaired vision from a first-person perspective. (2) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top, enters the frame from above, looking concernedly at the camera and gesturing with her hands. (3) The scene cuts to the woman leading the camera (POV) through a doorway into a bright, well-lit room. (4) The woman looks back at the camera with a playful smile and points toward a large, round wooden bathtub situated in the center of the room.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue top and white cardigan, is walking through an outdoor evening street market with shops in the background. She initially looks slightly confused and looks towards the camera. (2) She stops and listens, maintaining a neutral but attentive facial expression while nodding slightly. (3) She looks directly into the lens, smiles subtly, and delivers a quick verbal response with a playful yet sharp expression before the video ends.

(1) A person is completely covered by a large white sheet, sitting upright with their arms holding the edges of the sheet outward to resemble a ghost or a sculptural figure. The background is a white wall with red decals of string instruments. (2) The scene cuts to a low-angle rear view of the figure kneeling on a tiled floor, performing a rhythmic, swaying hip movement under the sheet as the lighting shifts to a dim, reddish tone. (3) The shot changes to the figure lying flat on a bed, fully covered by the white sheet, with a vertical light glare effect moving across the screen. (4) The visual returns to the initial seated ghost-like pose against the wall.

(1) The video is a non-live-action photo slideshow. It begins with a close-up of a smiling infant baby's face. (2) Subsequent photos show the baby in a red baby walker, sitting with a large Garfield plush, and laughing in a red bathtub. (3) The scene transitions to the child as a young girl with short hair, wearing a red dress and later a blue sweater. (4) Further photos depict her as a teenager wearing glasses at a birthday party and standing with a female friend outdoors. (5) The final segment shows her as an adult in various settings: taking mirror selfies, posing in a black slit dress at a bar, wearing branded black underwear, soaking in a wooden hot tub, and holding a small birthday cake.

(1) The video begins with a close-up shot of a young woman with long dark hair and a lavender top, looking directly into the lens with a pensive expression, her hand touching her face. (2) She starts speaking, using animated hand gestures, including holding up four fingers to emphasize a number. (3) Her facial expressions shift between frustration and a lighthearted smile as she continues her narrative, maintaining eye contact with the camera.

(1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black camisole, sits in an indoor setting and speaks directly into the camera. (2) Her facial expressions shift from a neutral narrative look to a saddened expression with eyes closed as she recounts a loss. (3) The video concludes with her smiling broadly and leaning slightly towards the camera to deliver the final punchline.

(1) Non-live action animation featuring a bald man as the protagonist. He walks towards a breakfast shop labeled 'Kestauran' while imagining a hearty meal. (1) The video starts with a woman wearing a blue off-shoulder top, jeans, and a dark blue beret dancing and walking enthusiastically down a wide warehouse aisle in a Costco. (1) A young woman with short dark hair in a white tiered dress waves excitedly to the camera in a modern room. (1) A young woman is sitting on a tatami floor in a bright room, looking down and reading a book; a retro green fan and headphones are on the floor beside her. (1) The video starts in a vertical format mimicking a social media live stream. A young woman with her hair in a bun and a white sheer top is waving at the camera and talking excitedly. She looks at the camera with wide-eyed surprise. (4) The camera focuses on her taking a large bite of a steak, closing her eyes in exaggerated enjoyment. (5) The video ends with a full-screen promotional graphic with text and images of food.

(1) Live-action video. A young woman in a white hoodie and a brown winter hat is crouching in the snow next to a log cabin. She is using red, duck-shaped plastic molds to create snow ducks on the ground. (2) She picks up a completed snow duck with her right hand and presents it to the camera with a satisfied smile. (1) The video starts with a close-up of a bowl of Oyakodon (chicken and egg rice bowl), featuring a bright orange raw egg yolk being gently poked with a bronze spoon to release the yolk. (1) The video begins with a graphic designed like a school exam paper titled 'Eye Test'; a circular window shows a stylized painting of a vast green field with three tiny figures in the distance. (1) The video starts in a kitchen with a woman dressed as a mother (wearing a curly wig and a cat-patterned apron) washing apples in a sink while a young girl eats in the background. The mother points at a laptop and various products while graphics explaining a promotion appear.

(1) A woman in a purple princess dress sits in a rustic, dimly lit room looking sadly at a smartphone; a brief cut shows a person in a prince costume drinking cola in an elevator. (1) A man and a woman stand in front of a white wall with a large 'Tomodachi' logo, both wearing denim outfits and waving at the camera. Various animated stickers like hearts, stars, and a moon appear around them as they pose. (3) The pair walks down a hallway, talking and laughing. At one point, they playfully bump into each other during a dance-like movement, with a text overlay indicating a 'collision accident'.

(1) A young woman dressed in a large circular lime costume walks confidently under a large concrete bridge before tripping and falling dramatically. (1) A woman wearing a blue and yellow birthday crown sits behind three cakes; two candles forming the number '18' are lit. She has a joyful expression and clasps her hands as if making a wish. (1) Live-action video begins with a close-up of a large knife slicing through a cereal bar on parchment paper, followed by a woman in a white tank top and denim overalls eating a piece and giving a double thumbs up with an enthusiastic facial expression. (2) The scene transitions to the creator pouring Kellogg's Granola into a glass bowl, followed by shots of her adding marshmallows and butter, then placing the bowl into a microwave. (1) The video begins with a title graphic for the Audi Q6 e-tron featuring influencer Chi-Chi. She is seen walking toward a gray Audi Q6 e-tron at a charging station. (3) At the back of the car, she performs a kick gesture under the bumper to trigger the hands-free tailgate, which opens to reveal the trunk. She begins eating a chocolate donut with a satisfied expression. (6) A close-up of the dashboard shows the battery charging from 10% to 51%. (1) A woman leans into the frame, speaking enthusiastically; she then presents a red and white package of instant noodles to the camera. (1) Three women stand on a snow-covered ground in casual winter athletic wear, holding ski boots and jackets; they rhythmically toss their gear toward the camera. (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun and wearing a white zip-up sweater is sitting at a desk in a studio with a yellow background. (1) A young woman in purple checkered pajamas stands by an open wardrobe, smells a white sports jersey, and makes a face of disgust. (1) A young woman is shown in close-up eating a piece of bread, then it cuts to her standing in a large indoor market space with people walking by in the background. (1) A young woman in white pants and a pink top walks toward the camera and then jumps onto a large round sofa in a modern living room. (1) The video starts with three men sitting on a couch in a room that looks like a subway carriage interior, talking to the camera. (1) A young woman with black hair in pigtails and a white tank top stands in a bright yellow room, gesturing to the camera. (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun is sitting in a right-handed tablet chair, attempting to write with her left hand while looking pained and showing how her arm is suspended. (1) Three women in full ski gear are dancing in a snowy field; a man dressed in a traditional gray monk robe appears between them. (1) A female creator with her hair in a bun and wearing a light blue shirt over a white top stands in a modern kitchen, gesturing energetically towards the camera. (1) The video begins with a man and a woman sitting at a table with plates of dumplings. The woman starts eating quickly, and the man attempts to match her pace. (1) A young female host with a silver hair clip and a denim jacket opens the video in a large, brightly lit industrial exhibition hall, waving and pointing at the camera. (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a grey plaid shirt, opens a brown paper bag from KFC. She excitedly unboxes fries, a bowl of rice, and a box of egg tarts. (1) A young woman with two pigtails opens a hotel door and enters a room. She explores the room's interior, featuring typical IKEA furniture, a large bed, and a colorful armchair. (1) The video begins with a female creator (Sui Sui) standing in front of a FamilyMart, gesturing excitedly and performing a signature dance move. (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman in a black beanie and white face mask smiling at the camera. (1) A young woman with her hair tied back, wearing a white mesh top, stands in a kitchen and speaks directly to the camera, holding up images of a man and another woman. (1) The video begins with a low-light shot of a desk, followed by a cut to the main character, a young woman with long black hair, sitting indoors at a table with a microphone. She gestures with her hands while expressing a look of concern and surprise. (2) The scene transitions to a series of quick cuts: an elevator floor indicator showing '12', a dark building corridor, and a dimly lit concrete stairwell where the camera moves downward rapidly in a POV style. A close-up shows a person's feet wearing only grey socks on the pavement. (4) The video returns to the woman indoors. She continues to speak to the camera, using hand gestures and facial expressions that shift from worry to an explanatory tone. Mathematical symbols and a 'thinking' graphic appear around her head briefly.

(1) A young woman stands in front of St Paul's Cathedral in Melbourne, gesturing towards the street. (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun enters a FamilyMart store wearing a striped top and a white outer shirt. (1) The video opens with a young woman in a white top slurping thin noodles from a bowl of ramen. (1) A young woman with dark hair tied back, wearing a white off-shoulder crop top and light blue jeans, leans toward the camera smiling.
